title: astragalus neoassadabadensis
intro: Astragalus neoassadabadensis is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae, native to Iran. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Astragalus neoassadabadensis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve cardiovascular health. Astragalus neoassadabadensis is commonly used in herbal preparations such as capsules, teas, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
